mapper.insert:
insert into outline_scenes ( project_id, scene_id, seq_no, title, int_ext, location_id, time_of_day, purpose_plot, purpose_character, characters_json, source_refs_json, status ) values
( #{scene.projectId}, #{scene.sceneId}, #{scene.seqNo}, #{scene.title}, #{scene.intExt}, #{scene.locationId}, #{scene.timeOfDay}, #{scene.purposePlot}, #{scene.purposeCharacter}, #{scene.charactersJson}, #{scene.sourceRefsJson}, #{scene.status} )
on duplicate key update seq_no = values(seq_no), title = values(title), int_ext = values(int_ext), location_id = values(location_id), time_of_day = values(time_of_day), purpose_plot = values(purpose_plot), purpose_character = values(purpose_character), characters_json = values(characters_json), source_refs_json = values(source_refs_json), status = values(status)
mapper.select: select id, project_id, scene_id, seq_no, title, int_ext, location_id, time_of_day, purpose_plot, purpose_character, characters_json, source_refs_json, status, created_at, updated_at from outline_scenes where project_id = #{projectId} order by seq_no asc
